title: feat: Review Entire Repository doesnt work. when clicking ‘start re...
body:
## Why

Review Entire Repository doesnt work.
when clicking ‘start repo review’ button the modal closes, but nothiung happens.
please investigate and fix!
it should basically act like a pr review.

## What

Fixed two code quality issues flagged by the validator: (1) removed the orphaned \`run_repo_review()\` function from \`repo_review.py\` along with its now-unused imports (\`asyncio\`, \`uuid\`, \`run_review\`, \`ReviewResult\`), since the API layer bypasses it and calls \`_run_repo_review_background\` directly; (2) replaced the always-true test assertion (\`hasattr(coro, 'cr_code')\`) in \`test_create_task_called_with_background_fn\` with \`assert coro.__qualname__ == '_run_repo_review_background'\`, which actually verifies the correct coroutine was scheduled. All 208 tests pass.

## How

Used \`coro.__qualname__\` (instance attribute on coroutine objects) rather than \`type(coro).__qualname__\` (which always yields 'coroutine') to meaningfully assert the originating async function. Verified this with a quick Python snippet confirming the distinction.

## Stats

`5 files` · `+240` / `-58`
